endpoints.desc: Drama detail + episodes with video URL
Get video streaming URL using fileId obtained from drama episodes in /api/v1/drama/:id response
Recommended dramas by category (17 categories). Use categoryKey to get specific category
Get dramas by tab (id: 1=Popular/Fokus, 2=New/Baru, 3=Chart/Peringkat, 6=Original+, 7=For Her/Wanita, 8=For Him/Pria, 11=Anime)
Search dramas by keyword (lang: id, en, ja, ko, es, pt, th)
Unlock episodes and get video URLs (720p)
Get all video URLs from series (cached 30 min)
Drama list (lang: en, ja, id, th, zh-TW, ms, ko, es, pt, de, tr, fr, ar)
Discover dramas (lang: en, ja, id, th, zh-TW, ms, ko, es, pt, de, tr, fr, ar)
Top ranked dramas (lang: en, ja, id, th, zh-TW, ms, ko, es, pt, de, tr, fr, ar)
Search drama (lang: en, ja, id, th, zh-TW, ms, ko, es, pt, de, tr, fr, ar)
Episode list (lang: en, ja, id, th, zh-TW, ms, ko, es, pt, de, tr, fr, ar)
Episode video URL (lang: en, ja, id, th, zh-TW, ms, ko, es, pt, de, tr, fr, ar)
Drama detail + episodes with video URL
Channel detail + series list per section
Drama detail (title, cover, genre, episodes, status)
List tabs with ID (for custom tab access)
Custom tab content by ID (get ID from /tabs endpoint)
Category dramas. region: 0=All, 1=Local, 2=Asia, 3=Western. audio: 0=All, 1=Subtitle, 2=Dubbed. tagId: from /categories cascadeTag level 3
Set language. Title, tags, content change accordingly
Drama detail + all episodes + cover per episode
Stream URL (M3U8) + subtitle (WebVTT). Auto unlock jika locked
Chapter video URL with auto-fetch subtitles
Search drama by keyword (q), or get search terms if no q
